prompt: [PERSON / BRAND] as the centerpiece of a surreal avant-garde mixed media collage, modern editorial illustration style. High-contrast black and white halftone stipple patterns layered with vibrant neo-expressionist colors. Bold geometric shapes, cyan and yellow risograph textures, graffiti scrawls, and digital glitch artifacts overlaid on the subject. A thick strip of pink or orange tape, or a flat color block, partially covers the form for a deconstructed look. Grainy vintage poster paper texture throughout. Strictly centered composition on a wide, clean off-white cream background, full subject visible with generous negative space on all sides, zero cropping, minimal chic aesthetic.
